title: cyrtomium clivicola
intro: Cyrtomium clivicola, also known as the mountain fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Cyrtomium genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyrtomium clivicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma, and even act as a natural antifungal agent. In herbal preparations, Cyrtomium clivicola is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
